name: Different Dimension Deepsea Trench
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>異</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>い</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>次</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>元</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>海</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>溝</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When this card resolves: Banish 1 WATER monster from your hand, Graveyard, or face-up on your field. Then, when this face-up card on the field is destroyed: Special Summon that banished monster to your side of the field.
eff: When this card resolves: Banish 1 WATER monster from your hand, Graveyard, or face-up on your field. Then, when this face-up card on the field is destroyed: Special Summon that banished monster to your side of the field.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
summoning: Special Summons the player's banished monsters
